title: Drop-in hook execution
story: As a framework developer, I want to drop a script into .isdlc/hooks/ and have it run automatically at the right workflow moment, so that I can extend the framework without modifying its source code.

title: Gate blocking with user control
story: As a framework developer, I want my validation hook to block gate advancement when it finds issues, and I want the ability to override that block when I decide the issue is acceptable.

title: Friendly hook point naming
story: As a framework developer, I want to name my hook directory post-implementation instead of post-06-implementation, so that I don't have to memorize internal phase identifiers.

title: Post-workflow notifications
story: As a team lead, I want to run notification scripts after workflows complete, so that the team is automatically informed of workflow outcomes.

title: Configurable hook timeout
story: As a team lead, I want to configure hook timeouts so that slow validation tools have enough time to complete without blocking fast hooks unnecessarily.

title: Hook authoring reference
story: As a framework developer, I want a guide explaining how to create hooks, available hook points, and the exit code protocol, so that I can write hooks without reading framework source code.
